name: teamLab Borderless Tickets: MORI Building DIGITAL ART MUSEUM
location: teamLab Borderless: MORI Building DIGITAL ART MUSEUM, Azabudai Hills, Tokyo
image_info: Save time: Access without waiting using the flexible pass and enjoy flexible entry within the admission hours
Boundaryless art experience: Artworks move freely between rooms, interact with each other, and create a continuous, ever-changing world

offers.discount: Free 1 eSIM per booking (via Klook app only)
offers.title: Enjoy additional 20% off Shinkansen

good_to_know: TeamLab Exhibition App Download: iOS | Android

This museum does not provide captions for the artworks because they constantly move. Instead, a guide app is available to explore artwork concepts based on your location. Some artworks even allow participation, letting you contribute to the creation.
During busy periods, numbered admission tickets for certain artworks are issued via the app. Make sure to download it before your visit for a richer experience!

name: teamLab Planets TOKYO Ticket
image_info: Cherry Blossom Season: Catch the fleeting beauty of cherry blossoms as they take over the interactive digital landscapes of teamLab Planets TOKYO
Save time: Access without waiting using the Skip-the-line Premium Pass and enjoy flexible entry within the admission hours
good_to_know: This ticket includes an exclusive offer for kids and a free 1-hour parking ticket
Pickup location: Urban Dock LaLaport Toyosu 1, 1st floor General Information Desk
Hours: 11:00 - 19:00 (Weekdays only)
Please present your KLOOK voucher and Urban Dock LaLaport Toyosu parking ticket that you receive when entering the parking lot
The parking ticket is only valid for the day of use
A lost parking ticket will not be reissued
Please note that you may have to wait in case of congestion
Shuttle buses (With an additional fee) are available between Tokyo Station, Ginza, and TeamLab Planets
Congestion is currently being experienced on the Toei 05-2 (Toei bus) heading toward Shin-Toyosu from Tokyo Station, Ginza, and Tsukiji, so please come by other public transportation

good_to_know: The museum contains dark corridors, uneven flooring, and water-based artworks
Luggage is not permitted inside the exhibition
Free lockers are available after the entrance gate

Some areas have water levels reaching up to knee height
Water-based artworks contain chlorine adjusted to safe levels
